global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the brand and promotional message.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features a combination of circles and rectangles in a minimalistic style, positioned centrally.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The logo displays the name 'HorizonHop' in a bold, modern font, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle element, visually simple and placed centrally within the ad.

elements.label: medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circle element, also centrally positioned, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Fly smarter message
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Special fares today' is prominently displayed in a bold font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text '€9.99 Try for free' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: HorizonHop title
elements.description: The title 'HorizonHop' is presented in a large, bold font at the top of the ad, establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, abstract shapes in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
